content:
<!-- Shared notice board. Keep to <=2-3 short bullets; delete bullets no longer true. -->

- **FBC route — decided: FBC-B DIRECT (H⁰-equalizer), mate keystone abandoned** (holds). The `base_change_mate_*` decls in FlatBaseChange.lean are off-path dead riders (sorry bodies, false docs) scheduled for deletion in a dedicated refactor iter. Capstone = `baseChangeGammaPullbackEquiv`. Steer via `USER_HINTS.md`.
- **SNAP coherence is near-done; FBC foundation needs a structural pivot (loop proceeding, no user action needed).** iter-014 eliminated the first sorry in ~6 iters: the SNAP associator-bridge half `hK_rhs` is now closed; the remaining half `hK_lhs` has a validated finish waiting once a Mathlib-idiom consult clears the associator-exposure step (iter-015). FBC `gammaPushforwardIso_comp` is now cold-build-proven to be an unfixable kernel bomb in its current construction — iter-015 pivots to a junction-free rebuild. If you can confirm a definitional convention or relax a frozen signature that shortcuts either, drop it in `USER_HINTS.md`.
